77766083.title: List of 2024 Summer Paralympics medal winners
77766083.extract: The 2024 Summer Paralympics, the 17th Summer Paralympic Games, and also more generally known as the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, was a major international multi-sport event for the disabled governed by the International Paralympic Committee, taking place in Paris, France from 28 August to 8 September. There are competition in 549 events in 22 sports.
